prompt: An ultra-realistic, cinematic portrait of a beautiful young woman riding a vintage black bicycle through an autumn park. She is wearing an elegant, dark brown Victorian-style dress with detailed lace trim, a high ruffle collar, a black bow tie, and a matching wide-brimmed vintage hat. Her long dark hair is caught in a gentle breeze, flowing dynamically behind her. The background features brilliant, golden-yellow ginkgo trees with autumn leaves softly falling around her, creating a warm, sun-drenched atmosphere. Captured on a 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, soft natural golden hour lighting, DSLR quality, 8k resolution, highly detailed textures, masterpiece.
